attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCXOOLE.HEADER_ID,
SCXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19, SCXOOLE.CISCO_SHIPCONFIRM_DATE,
   SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_NUMBER, SCXOOLE.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS,
   SCXOOLE.LINE_ID, SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME,
   SCXOOLE.QUOTE_NUMBER, SCXOOLE.TAA,
   SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID,
   SCXOOLE.PROJECT_NUMBER, SCXOOLE.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
   SCXOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG, SCXOOLE.BOOKING_PERCENT,
 SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER,
 SCXOOLE.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,'-999') AS SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,
   'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE,
 SCXOOLE.RESELLER_BID,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGE*/
 SCXOOLE.PAK_DELIVERY_PREF,
 /* FOLLOWING COLUMNS ADDED BY OM LSS TEAM */
 SCXOOLE.SMT_LINE_ID,
 SCXOOLE.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
 SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,
 SCXOOLE.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,
 SCXOOLE.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
 /*END*/
 /* AS PART OF Q3FY15 ADDITION OF 3 COLUMNS */
 SCXOOLE.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,
 SCXOOLE.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,
 SCXOOLE.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,
 ORIGINAL_PROMISED_DELIVER_DATE,
 /* AS PART OF Q3FY15 ADDITION OF 3 COLUMNS */
 /*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
 SCXOOLE.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE,
 SCXOOLE.REQUESTED_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
 SCXOOLE.SALES_MOTION,
 SCXOOLE.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17 BY NONLSS DEV TEAM */
 SCXOOLE.CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID,
 SCXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_PD,
 SCXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_SAD,
 COALESCE(SCXOOLE.MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999),
 COALESCE(SCXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(SCXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*ADDED AS PART OF ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM CHANGES Q3FY19 MAR 10TH RELEASE*/
 ,SCXOOLE.RTR_ELIGIBLE_FLG
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.IN_COUNTRY_ROUTING_CD,'UNKNOWN')
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID,-999)/* ADDED AS PART OF ACV@SCALE*/
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.GROUP_LINE_ID,-999) /* ADDED AS PART OF ACV@SCALE*/
 ,SCXOOLE.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE
 ,SCXOOLE.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_START_DATE
 ,SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_END_DATE
 /* ADDED AS PART OF SFP JUNE 28TH REL */
 ,SCXOOLE.MAGIC_KEY
 /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY21 ACV*/
 ,SCXOOLE.ACV_FLAG
 ,SCXOOLE.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG   
 ,SCXOOLE.ACV_AMOUNT  /*END OF ACV SCALE*/
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ORIG_MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999)
 ,SCXOOLE.NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLAG /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 ,SCXOOLE.LEASE_CLASSIFICATION /* ATHENA JUNE REL*/
 ,SCXOOLE.USER_INTENT /* SMR NOV-FY22 */
 ,SCXOOLE.ATR_LINK_ID /*FEB13TH IACV*/
 ,SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_LINE_ID /*MAR13TH IACV*/
 ,SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_NUMBER /*MAR13TH IACV*/ 
 ,SCXOOLE.FEE_REF_LINE_ID /* MAY RELEASE*/
 ,SCXOOLE.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP
 ,COALESCE(CAST(SCXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
 ,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /* 19 columns added Fy24 Nov release*/
 ,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID
,SCXOOLE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE  /* 20 columns added Fy24 dec release*/
,SCXOOLE.CREATION_DATE
,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_INFO /*adding one column MAR-24 release*/
,SCXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_FLAG		 /* Epic 8758 June 25 release */
,SCXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_END_DATE
,SCXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_NUMBER	/* Epic 8547 SEP 25 release */
,SCXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_LINE_ID
,SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT SCXOOLE
            
 LEFT JOIN 
 (
 $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
 LEFT JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON
 ( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
 )
 ON 
 (SCXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
 ON SCXOOLE.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT /* AS PART OF SALES_ORDER_LINES CHANGES FOR AUGUST RELEASE,2014*/
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_PBS /*SSRESHTA*/
 ON ( SCXOOLE.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID=SSOL_PBS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_PBS.SS_CODE ='CG' )/*SSRESHTA*/
 /*MAY RELEASE OMEGA CHANGE*/
 LEFT JOIN
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL_OPL
 ON NSOL_OPL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM=SCXOOLE.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
 AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL'
 
 WHERE SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL OR (SCXOOLE.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL)
       OR (SSOL_PBS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND SCXOOLE.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID<>-999) -- ADDED BY SSRESHTA FOR MAY17TH RELEASE
       
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOLE.LINE_ID,SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)  =1

SELECT
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19 ,
SCXOOLE.CISCO_SHIPCONFIRM_DATE ,
SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS ,
SCXOOLE.LINE_ID ,
SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SCXOOLE.QUOTE_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.TAA ,
SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID ,
SCXOOLE.PROJECT_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.FOUNDATION_FLAG ,
SCXOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG ,
SCXOOLE.BOOKING_PERCENT ,
CASE WHEN SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID = '-1' THEN CAST (-7777 AS INTEGER)
ELSE SSOL_BNDLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /* MODIFIED AS PART OF BUNDLE LINE ID ECR */
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE,
/* AS PART OF Q3FY15 ADDITION OF 3 COLUMNS */
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,-999) AS LEG0_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,-999) AS LEG1_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,-999) AS LEG2_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISED_DELIVER_DATE,
/* AS PART OF Q3FY15 ADDITION OF 3 COLUMNS */
SCXOOLE.SALES_MOTION,
SCXOOLE.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(SSOL_CVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-9999) AS COVERED_PRODUCT_SOL_KEY,
/* AS PART OF Q3FY17 BY NONLSS DEV TEAM ADDITION OF 3 COLUMNS */
SCXOOLE.CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID,
SCXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_PD,
SCXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_SAD,
SCXOOLE.RTR_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
CAST(SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CONTRACT_START_DATE,
CAST(SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CONTRACT_END_DATE,
/* ADDED AS PART OF SFP JUNE 28TH REL */
SCXOOLE.MAGIC_KEY AS MAGIC_KEY_ID
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ACV_FLAG,'N') AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,'N') AS ACV_FLG
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ACV_AMOUNT,0) AS ANNUAL_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLAG,'N') AS NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLAG /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,CASE WHEN LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 IN 'ANNUAL' THEN 'ANNUAL BILLING'
WHEN LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 IN 'BI-ANNUAL' THEN 'BI-ANNUAL BILLING'
WHEN LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 IN 'QUARTERLY' THEN 'QUARTERLY BILLING'
WHEN LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 IN 'MONTHLY' THEN 'MONTHLY BILLING'
WHEN LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 IN 'PREPAID' THEN 'PREPAID TERM'
ELSE COALESCE(LKP.ATTRIBUTE3 ,'UNKNOWN')END BILLING_MODEL_NAME
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LEASE_CLASSIFICATION,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_LEASE_TYPE_NAME /*ATHENA JUNE REL*/
,SCXOOLE.USER_INTENT AS AVAIL_TO_RNW_USR_INTENT_NM/* SMR NOV-FY22 */
,SCXOOLE.ATR_LINK_ID AS AVAIL_TO_RENEW_LINK_ID/*FEB13TH IACV*/
,COALESCE(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS CREDIT_REBILL_ORG_SOL_KEY /*MAR13TH IACV */
,COALESCE(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) AS CREDIT_REBILL_ORG_SO_KEY /*MAR13TH IACV */
,COALESCE(NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS COVERED_CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP 
,COALESCE(CAST(SCXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,'-999') AS SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE
,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /* added 19 COL FY24 NOV Rel */
,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOLE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID /* added 19 COL FY24 NOV Rel */
,CASE WHEN 
SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOLE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'
END AS CR_CONTACTS_TYPE,
CAST(COALESCE(SCXOOLE.CREATION_DATE,current_timestamp(0)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_TV_DTM,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
CASE WHEN SCXOOLE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_SSTP_COMPLIANT_FLG
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_INFO,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT
--SCXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_INFO
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_FLAG,'N') AS PRICE_ROLLUP_BUNDLE_FLG	 /* Epic 8758 June 25 */
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_END_DATE,cast('3500-01-01' as date )) AS ROLLUP_BUNDLE_END_DATE
,SCXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_NUMBER
,SCXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_LINE_ID
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM_NAME
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER_NAME
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_PUB_CLD_MARKETPLACE_AGRMT_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT SCXOOLE
INNER JOIN
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON
( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
)
ON
(SCXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_HDRS_EXT HEXT
ON SCXOOLE.HEADER_ID=HEXT.HEADER_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = HEXT.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE
AND LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXGCO_PERIODIC_BILL_SCHEDULE'
AND LANG = 'US'
AND ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_BNDLE
ON ( SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID=SSOL_BNDLE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_BNDLE.SS_CODE ='CG' ) /* MODIFIED AS PART OF BUNDLE LINE ID ECR */

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_CVD
ON ( SCXOOLE.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID=SSOL_CVD.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_CVD.SS_CODE ='CG' ) /*MODIFIED AS PART OF RTNR CHANGES FY17NOV6 RELEASE*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV
WHERE END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SS_CODE='CG'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) NSOLT

ON NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_LINE_ID
AND NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_NUMBER
/*MAY RELEASE OMEGA CHANGE*/
LEFT JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL_OPL
ON NSOL_OPL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM=SCXOOLE.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER
AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOLE.LINE_ID ORDER BY SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1
/*SELECT
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19 ,
SCXOOLE.CISCO_SHIPCONFIRM_DATE ,
SCXOOLE.CONTRACT_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS ,
SCXOOLE.LINE_ID ,
SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SCXOOLE.QUOTE_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.TAA ,
SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID ,
SCXOOLE.PROJECT_NUMBER ,
SCXOOLE.FOUNDATION_FLAG ,
SCXOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG ,
SCXOOLE.BOOKING_PERCENT ,
CASE WHEN SCXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19 = '-1' THEN CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER)
ELSE SSOL_BNDLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT SCXOOLE
INNER JOIN
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON
( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
)
ON
(SCXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_BNDLE
ON ( SCXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19=SSOL_BNDLE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_BNDLE.SS_CODE ='CG' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOLE.LINE_ID ORDER BY SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1*/

SELECT	
ECXOOLE.HEADER_ID,
ECXOOLE.ATTRIBUTE19, ECXOOLE.CISCO_SHIPCONFIRM_DATE,
		ECXOOLE.CONTRACT_NUMBER, ECXOOLE.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS,
		ECXOOLE.LINE_ID, ECXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECXOOLE.QUOTE_NUMBER, ECXOOLE.TAA,
		ECXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, ECXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID,
		ECXOOLE.PROJECT_NUMBER, ECXOOLE.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
		ECXOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG, ECXOOLE.BOOKING_PERCENT,
ECXOOLE.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER,
ECXOOLE.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
COALESCE(ECXOOLE.SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,'-999') AS SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,
ECXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE,
ECXOOLE.RESELLER_BID,
/*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGE*/
ECXOOLE.PAK_DELIVERY_PREF,
/* FOLLOWING COLUMNS ADDED by OM LSS team */
ECXOOLE.SMT_LINE_ID,
ECXOOLE.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
ECXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,
ECXOOLE.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,
ECXOOLE.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
/*END*/
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
ECXOOLE.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,
ECXOOLE.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,
ECXOOLE.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,
ORIGINAL_PROMISED_DELIVER_DATE,
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
/*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
ECXOOLE.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE,
ECXOOLE.REQUESTED_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
/*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
ECXOOLE.SALES_MOTION,
ECXOOLE.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID,
/*ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY17 BY NONLSS DEV TEAM */
ECXOOLE.CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID,
ECXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_PD,
ECXOOLE.PRE_ALIGN_SAD,
COALESCE(ECXOOLE.MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999),
COALESCE(ECXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_NAME,'UNKNOWN'), /*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
COALESCE(ECXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*Added as part of ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM changes Q3FY19 Mar 10th Release*/
,ECXOOLE.RTR_ELIGIBLE_FLG
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.IN_COUNTRY_ROUTING_CD,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID,-999)/* Added as part of ACV@SCALE*/
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.GROUP_LINE_ID,-999)/* Added as part of ACV@SCALE*/
,ECXOOLE.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE
,ECXOOLE.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,ECXOOLE.CONTRACT_START_DATE
,ECXOOLE.CONTRACT_END_DATE
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
,ECXOOLE.MAGIC_KEY
/* Added as part of Q1FY21 ACV*/
,ECXOOLE.ACV_FLAG
,ECXOOLE.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG   
,ECXOOLE.ACV_AMOUNT  /*END OF ACV SCALE*/
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.ORIG_MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999)
,ECXOOLE.NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLAG /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,ECXOOLE.LEASE_CLASSIFICATION /* Athena june rel*/
,ECXOOLE.USER_INTENT /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
,ECXOOLE.ATR_LINK_ID /*feb13th iACV*/
,ECXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_LINE_ID /*Mar13th iACV*/
,ECXOOLE.ORIGINAL_SO_NUMBER /*Mar13th iACV*/
,ECXOOLE.FEE_REF_LINE_ID /*May release*/
,ECXOOLE.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*added as part of a may release*/
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP,'UNKNOWN') AS LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP
,COALESCE(CAST(ECXOOLE.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))
,COALESCE(ECXOOLE.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
,ECXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /* 19 col added fy24 nov rel*/
,ECXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.RESELLER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOLE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID
,ECXOOLE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE /* 20 col added fy24 dec rel*/
,ECXOOLE.CREATION_DATE
,ECXOOLE.END_CUSTOMER_INFO
,ECXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_FLAG /* Epic 8758 June 25 */
,ECXOOLE.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_END_DATE
,ECXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_NUMBER /* Epic 8547 SEP Release */
,ECXOOLE.TRIAL_REF_SO_LINE_ID
,ECXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,ECXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,ECXOOLE.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
FROM	
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ECXOOLE
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT SCXOOLE
											WHERE ECXOOLE.LINE_ID = SCXOOLE.LINE_ID AND SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME   = 'CG')
